# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

repositories:
  s3_backup_repo:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: ops-elasticsearch-snapshots
      region: us-east-1
      base_path: elasticsearch/prod
      compress: true
      chunk_size: 1gb
      readonly: false

snapshot_policy:
  name: automated_daily_backup
  repository: s3_backup_repo
  schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
  config:
    indices:
      - "*"
    include_global_state: true
    ignore_unavailable: true
    partial: false
  retention:
    expire_after: 30d
    min_count: 7
    max_count: 90

snapshot_operations:
  create_snapshot:
    method: PUT
    path: "/_snapshot/s3_backup_repo/{{snapshot_name}}"
    parameters:
      wait_for_completion: false
      master_timeout: "30s"
      timeout: "60m"
    body:
      indices: "*"
      include_global_state: true
      ignore_unavailable: true
      partial: false

  restore_snapshot:
    method: POST
    path: "/_snapshot/s3_backup_repo/{{snapshot_name}}/_restore"
    parameters:
      wait_for_completion: false
      master_timeout: "30s"
      timeout: "60m"
    body:
      indices: "*"
      include_global_state: true
      ignore_unavailable: true
      rename_pattern: "(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored_$1"

repository_alternative:
  file_share_repo:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mnt/es-backups
      compress: true
      readonly: false

automation_notes:
  preferred_repository_order:
    - s3_backup_repo
    - file_share_repo
  verification:
    - "_snapshot/s3_backup_repo/_all"
    - "_snapshot/file_share_repo/_all"
